title: Mobile user has few headsets, some disconnected
scenario: Lens tenant correctly shows green marks for active headsets and red marks for disconnected headsets across Inventory, device profile, and user profile pages when 3+ headsets are paired with some disconnected
steps: 1. Open the Poly Lens tenant web portal and navigate to the Inventory page.
2. Pair 3 or more Poly Bluetooth headsets with a mobile device running the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Ensure at least one headset is actively connected (powered on and paired) and at least one is disconnected (turned off or unpaired).
4. On the Inventory page, observe the status indicators for each headset.
5. Navigate to the Inventory/Device Profile page for one of the headsets.
6. Observe the status indicator on the device profile page.
7. Navigate to the Device Users / User Profile page for the mobile user.
8. Observe the status indicators for each headset associated with that user.
expected: Active (connected) headsets are displayed with green status marks, and disconnected (turned off or unpaired) headsets are displayed with red status marks on the Inventory page, Inventory/Device Profile page, and Device Users/User Profile page.
